message:
feat(signature-cli): add disable, enable, and stats commands

Implement three new signature management commands:
- `disable`: Disable a signature without deleting it (persists to config)
- `enable`: Re-enable a previously disabled signature
- `stats`: Show signature performance statistics with sorting options

Commands use the pattern_persistence module for state management.
Part of process_triage-q4ho.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
